keywords.job: I am the master of the hall of the ancients.
keywords.name: My name is Isimov Dustbearer, Son of Fire and Earth, from the Molten Rock.
keywords.hall: The burial chamber of our ancestors. All of the firstborn of our race are there .. all but Durin.
keywords.ancients: The burial chamber of our ancestors. All of the firstborn of our race are there .. all but Durin.
keywords.tibia: A world of dangers, a world of wonders.
keywords.kazordoon: The last haven for dwarfenkind. Our last hope for our survival.
keywords.big: This mountain is as old as the world. The first dwarfs were born here.
keywords.old: This mountain is as old as the world. The first dwarfs were born here.
keywords.elves: Bah, squirrels, hedgehogs, rabbits, elves ... who cares.
keywords.humans: A young and greedy race, though more noble. They remind me of orcs sometimes.
keywords.orcs: The greenskins are after all of us. Beware! Beware!
keywords.minotaurs: They leave us alone, we leave them alone, that's the way of our people.
keywords.pyromancer: They whorship the elemental forces of fire.
keywords.geomancer: They whorship the elemental forces of earth.
keywords.technomancer: Strange, are they still around? Well, give them one or two hundred years and they are gone again, jawoll.
keywords.god: The gods abandoned us, we abandoned the gods. That's it, no big deal I tell ya, jawoll.
keywords.keeper: The gods abandoned us, we abandoned the gods. That's it, no big deal I tell ya, jawoll.
keywords.shepherd: The gods abandoned us, we abandoned the gods. That's it, no big deal I tell ya, jawoll.
keywords.fire: It's warm, it's useful, we use it. We decide when or how, jawoll.
keywords.earth: Gives us food and shelter, quite useful isn't it?
keywords.durin: Ah yes, the first born. He became a higher entity to protect us. His mortal remains were buried at a remote spot where only pilgrims disturb their peace now and then.
keywords.life: Life is easy to understand, you have birth, you have death. Simple stuff, even elves could grasp the concept.
keywords.plant: Don't know much about this stuff. Find them in a soup sometimes.
keywords.citizen: You can become citizen of Kazordoon by the power of our ancestors.
keywords.kroox: What a hasty fellow. Can't be healthy to live in such a hurry, jawoll.
keywords.jimbin: Isn't that the kid that took over the Jolly Axeman tavern? Far too young for such a job, but did anyone ask me? No!
keywords.maryza: How could she marry this Jimbin? I mean, they are kids! Know nothing about life and stuff. Couldn't they wait at least hundred years or so?
keywords.bezil: Bezil and Nezil are typical profiteers. Fine new breed of dwarfs we raised, pah.
keywords.nezil: Bezil and Nezil are typical profiteers. Fine new breed of dwarfs we raised, pah.
keywords.uzgod: Has hardly a beard and already forgotten the traditions of his ancestors. Modern techniques ... almost like one of these technomancers.
keywords.etzel: Etzel, good old Etzel. I was his tutor long ago. Now he's running a guild ... they grow so fast ... so fast, jawoll.
keywords.gregor: Never heared that word. What's a gregor?
keywords.duria: Could become a great warrior one day. Still needs to learn so much.
keywords.emperor: The emperor resides far above us in the upper caves. Sometimes I wonder if it's good that the emperor is that much away from the temples.
keywords.kruzak: The emperor resides far above us in the upper caves. Sometimes I wonder if it's good that the emperor is that much away from the temples.
keywords.motos: Must admit there were worse generals in the years before, jawoll.
keywords.general: Must admit there were worse generals in the years before, jawoll.
keywords.army: <sigh> A bunch of kids playing war. May the elements help us.
keywords.ferumbras: I have seen many of his type coming and going. He will fall and anotherone will take his place.
keywords.excalibug: Ahhh! Whan I was a little dwarf I was on a quest to find it. I was almost literally digging up the ghostlands for it and now only one thing is sure: It must be elsewere, jawoll.
keywords.news: News? I heard there's a new human settlement in the south, called Thai...something.
keywords.help: Can't you kids do anything on your own?
keywords.quest: You are too young for quests, jawoll.
keywords.task: You are too young for quests, jawoll.
keywords.what: You are too young for quests, jawoll.
keywords.do: You are too young for quests, jawoll.
keywords.gold: Greed for gold could blind your sight for the important.
keywords.money: Greed for gold could blind your sight for the important.
keywords.fight: The life ot a dwarf is an eternal struggle. It hardens us and makes us the fine race we are, jawoll.
keywords.time: I think it's the fourth age of the yellow flame, isn't it?

texts: I am the master of the hall of the ancients.
